lessons.topic: Finding items in the grocery store - where is the rice aisle, do you have fish sauce
Asking for help at the deli counter - half a pound of ham, sliced thin please
Reading sale signs and coupons - buy one get one free, 20 percent off
Checking out at the register - paper or plastic, do you have a rewards card
Returning spoiled or wrong items - this milk is expired, I bought the wrong one
Asking about ingredients and allergies - does this contain peanuts, is this gluten free
Comparing prices and sizes - which one is cheaper, is the bigger one a better deal
Using self checkout machines - scan the barcode, select payment method, unexpected item
Talking to other shoppers in line - is this the express lane, are you in line
Picking up a prescription - I'm here to pick up my medication, last name Nguyen
Asking the pharmacist about medicine - how many times a day, take with food
Describing symptoms to buy over the counter medicine - headache, cold, sore throat, cough
Understanding medicine labels - take twice daily, do not exceed 4 tablets, keep refrigerated
Insurance and copay at the pharmacy - how much is my copay, is this covered by insurance
Asking about generic vs brand name medicine - is there a cheaper version, same ingredient
Refilling prescriptions - I need a refill, can you call my doctor for authorization
Side effects and drug interactions - will this make me drowsy, can I take this with my other medicine
Getting a flu shot or vaccine at the pharmacy - do I need an appointment, which arm
Asking for sizes - do you have this in medium, do you have a smaller size
Where is the fitting room and trying on clothes - can I try this on, it doesn't fit
Asking about colors and styles - do you have this in black, something more casual
Returning and exchanging items - I want to return this, do you have the receipt
Asking about sales and discounts - when is the next sale, is there a student discount
Asking for recommendations - what goes with this, what do you recommend for a wedding
Complaining about defective items - this zipper is broken, it has a hole, I just bought it
Online order pickup and issues - I ordered online, my order is wrong, can I get a refund
Negotiating at flea markets and yard sales - can you do 5 dollars, what's your best price
Opening a bank account - I want to open a checking account, what do I need
Depositing and withdrawing money - I want to deposit this check, I need to withdraw 200
Asking about fees and interest rates - is there a monthly fee, what is the interest rate
Reporting a lost or stolen card - my card was stolen, I need to cancel it
Sending money internationally - I want to wire money to Vietnam, what are the fees
Mailing a package at the post office - I want to send this to Vietnam, how much for priority
Buying stamps and mailing letters - I need 10 stamps, where is the mailbox
Tracking a package - where is my package, it says delivered but I didn't get it
Understanding bank statements and suspicious charges - what is this charge, I didn't authorize this
